recommendations.title: Housefull 2
recommendations.overview: A comedy of errors wherein four men help each other to fool their prospective father-in-laws creating a cascade of confusion and mayhem.

recommendations.title: Volver
recommendations.overview: Three generations of women deal with family secrets while surviving the east wind, fire, insanity, superstition, lies and even death.

recommendations.title: Sex and Death 101
recommendations.overview: A guy's life is turned around by an email, which includes the names of everyone he's had sex with and ever will have sex with. His situation gets worse when he encounters a femme fatale who targets men guilty of sex crime.

recommendations.title: Don't Think Twice
recommendations.overview: An improv group deals with several crises, including the loss of their lease and one member hitting the big time.

recommendations.title: Live Twice, Love Once
recommendations.overview: A retired academic teacher tries to find the love of his youth after being diagnosed with Alzheimer's.

recommendations.title: After Sex
recommendations.overview: Sex is a background to examine intimacy and vulnerability. Looks at the complexity of modern day relationships told through eight separate couples. Through dialogue and compromising situations, the film takes us from the beginning of a relationship t

recommendations.title: Tucker and Dale vs. Evil
recommendations.overview: Two hillbillies are suspected of being killers by a group of paranoid college kids camping near the duo's West Virginian cabin. As the body count climbs, so does the fear and confusion as the college kids try to seek revenge against the pair.

recommendations.title: Extreme Movie
recommendations.overview: A sketch comedy movie about the joys and embarrassments of teen sex. But mostly the embarrassments.

recommendations.title: 20,000 Species of Bees
recommendations.overview: Lucía is an eight-year-old girl, who sometimes struggles as the world tries to catch up with the fact that she is trans. As the summer holidays pass, she explores her femininity alongside the women of her family who at the same time reflect on their

recommendations.title: August 15th
recommendations.overview: Three men are abandonned by their wives for a few days in the summer holidays. They are alone with five kids to feed and a house to maintain. And they will learn what they did wrong with their wives.
